title: malpighia substrigosa
intro: Malpighia substrigosa, also known as the Jamaican cherry or Panama berry, is a species of plant in the Malpighiaceae family, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malpighia substrigosa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
